series_metadata.series_title: Districts in Excess of 10 Mill Report
series_metadata.series_description: The Tax Rates Report for Districts in Excess of 10 Mill is run each year following calculation of tax reduction factors and sent to counties that have overages in any of their districts.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five years after the date the report is sent to the county. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain five years after the date the report is sent to the county., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
